- [ ] `offensive-osint` v____

- [ ] Claude.ai (web)

## Model

(e.g., `claude-sonnet-4-6`, `claude-opus-4-6`, `claude-haiku-4-5`)

```

```

## Expected behavior

What you expected the skill to do (which sections should have been referenced, what content should have been returned).

## Actual behavior

What Claude actually did. Paste the relevant portion of the response (sanitize any sensitive data).

## Reproducibility

- [ ] Always reproduces
- [ ] Sometimes reproduces
- [ ] Reproduced once

## Additional context

Anything else that might help diagnose the issue (other skills loaded, recent changes, etc.).
